compliance_degree.reason: The activity "judge high risk loan" is assigned to the required resource "branch office manager", and the missing activity "take final decision" is inserted directly after it.

change_cost.reason: Only two localized changes are required: one resource annotation update and one activity insertion.

structural_quality_impact.reason: The existing structured tree remains intact. The new activity is inserted in the same sequence immediately after the high-risk loan judgment without adding new branching or loop complexity.

change_location.reason: The change is located in the high-risk loan handling path, after initial request handling and condition checks but before contract initialization and settlement.

compliance_degree.reason: This strategy also satisfies both parts of the requirement: the correct resource is assigned and "take final decision" directly follows "judge high risk loan".
